# AI Co-Scientist

AI Co-Scientist is a multi-agent research workspace for creating goals, generating hypotheses, reviewing evidence, ranking ideas, and synthesizing reports.

## Primary pages

- [Home](https://ai-co-scientist.com/): Workspace entry point.

## Notes

- Goal report routes under `/runs/:id` may contain user-created sessions and should not be indexed.
- Generated research output is not medical or clinical guidance.
